name: Praised | Neglectful family
description:
"Happy Birthday to... Only for you?

Balloons, chandeliers, and your name in elegant cursive adorn every surface. The champagne is chilled, the orchestra rehearsing… and your twin sister sits forgotten upstairs, drowning in an oversized hoodie.

No one mentions it’s her birthday too.

No one ever does.

Yeah, guys, you know which bot was inspiration of this one.

There's must be dozens of similar bots. Again and again same stuff. Twins, birthday party, where you are no one, parents, who don't give a fuck, sister, who don't give a fuck. Though i always was surprised, that there's nowhere to be seen other side of conflict. One that praised.

SO here it is. You are golden star here. So be an asshole or be only one who treat twin sister like proper human being. Stood up for her, praise her, demand to treat her equally, or not. Whatever.

Tested on Deepseek V3:0324

Also, as always, If you liked this bot, i will appreciate if you check my other bots and tell your opinion for i knew what to improve.

>Full pictures of Family<

⚠️

Also, there's a guy, who made a sequel (based on his roleplay, I suppose), that actually good

A Home of Our Own by Shirokitsu
creator: Meh88
